tokens: Description: Stores information about different tokens available in the system, including blockchain metadata, pricing, and configuration for payments and NFTs.
(tokens) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the token document.
(tokens) userId (ObjectId | null): Reference to the user this token may belong to, if applicable. Refers to MODEL_USER.
(tokens) tokenId (ObjectId | null): Reference to the parent token, if this is a sub-token. Refers to MODEL_TOKEN.
(tokens) addressId (String, required): Unique address identifier for this token on the blockchain.
(tokens) name (String): Name of the token (like, Bitcoin, Ethereum).
(tokens) symbol (String): Symbol of the token (like, BTC, ETH).
(tokens) code (String): Optional code for the token.
(tokens) icon (String, required): URL or filename of the token icon.
(tokens) decimal (Number): Number of decimal places for the token.
(tokens) contractAddress (String, required): Smart contract address for the token.
(tokens) nativeAsset (String, required): Native asset identifier of the blockchain (like, ETH for Ethereum).
(tokens) isSubToken (Number, default: 0): 1 if the token is a sub-token, 0 otherwise.
(tokens) status (Number, default: 1): Status of the token (1 = active, 0 = inactive).
(tokens) isDisplayOnHome (Number, default: 0): Flag to show the token on the home screen.
(tokens) isPaymentLink (Number, default: 0): Flag indicating if this token can be used for payment links.
(tokens) isNft (Number, default: 0): Flag indicating if this token is an NFT.
(tokens) minPaymentLinkUSD (Number | null, default: null): Minimum USD amount for creating a payment link with this token.
(tokens) usdPrice (Number, default: 0): Current USD price of the token.
(tokens) tryPrice (Number, default: 0): Current TRY price of the token.
(tokens) eurPrice (Number, default: 0): Current EUR price of the token.
(tokens) USDTRY (Number, default: 0): USD to TRY conversion rate.
(tokens) USDEUR (Number, default: 0): USD to EUR conversion rate.
(tokens) standards (Array): Array of supported standards (like, ERC-20, BEP-20).
(tokens) standard (String | null, default: null): Primary standard of the token.
(tokens) twCoinType (Number): Token type identifier for internal categorization.
(tokens) tatumAsset (String | null, default: null): Asset identifier used in Tatum integration.
(tokens) maxTxLimit (Number): Maximum transaction limit for this token.
(tokens) minTxLimit (Number): Minimum transaction limit for this token.
(tokens) changellyAsset (String | null, default: null): Identifier for Changelly integration.
(tokens) chain (String | null, default: null): Blockchain network name (like, Ethereum, BSC).
(tokens) chainIds (Array of Numbers, default: []): Array of supported chain IDs for this token.
(tokens) createdAt (Date): Timestamp of when the token was created.
(tokens) updatedAt (Date): Timestamp of the last update to this token document.
